title: Deuce (disambiguation)
content:
'''Deuce''' can refer to:
*Certain member of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] using the [[call sign]] [[Rogue Two/Legends|Rogue Two]]:
**[[Ibtisam]]
**[[Peshk Vri'syk]]
**[[Asyr Sei'lar]]
**[[Kral Nevil]]
*[[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] nicknamed "Impstar-Deuce"

{{Disambig}}
